title: Piekarnia Modpack
description: A balanced survival-focused modpack that adds depth and immersion without the overwhelm of kitchen-sink packs. Perfect for players who want more than vanilla + QoL, but less clutter than Better Minecraft or All The Mods. Explore, build, and farm in a world
body:
# 🌿 Immersive Survival & Adventure Modpack

This pack is designed for players who want more than vanilla + QoL, but feel that big kitchen-sink packs like All the Mods or Better Minecraft are overwhelming. It carefully balances depth, immersion, and accessibility: you get richer gameplay, beautiful exploration, and meaningful progression without drowning in complexity or endless systems.

# 🏞️ What It Adds

- Exploration & World Generation: Terralith, YUNG’s structures, and ATI Structures reshape the world with breathtaking terrain, dungeons, temples, and towns.
- Atmosphere & Immersion: AmbientSounds, Particle Rain, Subtle Effects, and Fresh Animations make every biome feel alive.
- Farming & Cooking: Farmer’s Delight, Crate Delight, More Delight, and Let’s Do! add flavorful farming, brewing, and cooking experiences.
- Building & Decoration: Macaw’s collection and Supplementaries expand creative options for cozy homesteads, towns, and landscapes.
- Quality of Life: Mouse Tweaks, Veinminer, Xaero’s World Map, Waystones, and Better Combat streamline play without breaking balance.
- Performance: Lithium, EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast, and Distant Horizons ensure smooth performance, even with all the upgrades.

# 🎯 Why Play This Modpack?

This pack is for players who want:

- Vanilla-friendly progression, expanded thoughtfully.
- A world full of discovery and immersion — not grind.
- A balance between exploration, farming, and building.
- A lighter alternative to massive packs, but deeper than vanilla.

⚠️ Important Notes

- Built for Fabric/Quilt loaders.
- Works well in multiplayer; no unfair cheats or hacks.
- Runs best on medium-to-high performance PCs due to enhanced worldgen and visuals.
